title: Cori L.
description: Cori L. Gabbard is a Clinical Assistant Professor in the Writing Program at NYU Shanghai. She recently was a Visiting Assistant Professor of English at Lyon College.
text:
Cori L. Gabbard
Cori L. Gabbard is a Clinical Assistant Professor in the Writing Program at NYU Shanghai. She recently was a Visiting Assistant Professor of English at Lyon College.
Select Publications
Criticism
Guest editorship: Documentary record of Jane Marcus Feminist University, Virginia Woolf Miscellany, Issue 93 (2018)
“ ‘Begin, begin, of some old king and queen, [o]f Lugaid Redstripe or another’: ‘Modernizing’ the ‘Medieval’ in William Butler Yeats’ Deirdre,” The Yeats Journal of Korea, Vol. 53 (2017). Winner of the 2017 Professor Daniel Albright Essay Award
“The Radical Traditionalist: Naomi Mitchison, Aud the Deep-Minded and The Land the Ravens Found, ” International Review of Scottish Studies, Vol. 42 (2017)
Poetry
“Branwen, Queen of Iwerdon.” Scottishfest. April, 2019: www.arscottishfest.com/
“Leda’s Afterword.” Poets of Alexandria, Curating Alexandria collection. Feb. 2019
Education
PhDThe Graduate Center, CUNY
MA City College, CUNY
BAWellesley College
Medieval and Post-1900 British Literature as it is broadly defined
Poetry Writing
